steps.title: Locate the input speed
steps.content: Use $x=55$ on the graph because the input is the vehicle's speed in miles per hour.

steps.title: Read the model value
steps.content: At $x=55$, the quadratic model is a little above $200$ feet. Among the choices, $210$ is the closest estimate.

steps.title: Choose the closest estimate
steps.content: The estimates $25$ and $30$ are far too low, and $250$ is closer to the graph near $60$ miles per hour. The best estimate at $55$ miles per hour is $210$. The answer is C.
